variants.text:
Hi [Name] 👋
Old Klang Road 有个新 Freehold 项目，刚开放新一批单位。
💰 RM4XXk 起 🏡 2房 / 3房 / Dual Key 🎁 Developer 帮付律师费 + 家电全送
老实说，这个价位的 KL Freehold 现在越来越少见 — 也是这一区相对最好入手的新项目之一。
如果你最近有在看 KL Property，蛮值得了解一下 👌
折扣 + rebate 后价 · 不想收信息回 STOP

Hi [Name] 👋
Got a new Freehold project at Old Klang Road, just released a new batch of units.
💰 From RM4XXk 🏡 2BR / 3BR / Dual Key 🎁 Developer pays legal fee + free furnishing

Honestly, this kind of price for KL Freehold is getting quite rare already — and it's one of the easier-entry new projects around this area now.
If you're looking at KL property, quite worth to check out 👌
After discount & rebate · reply STOP to opt out

顺便发你户型图参考 👇
📐 Type A — 658 sqft 🛏️ 2 Bedroom 🚿 2 Bathroom
📐 Type B — 716 sqft 🛏️ 3 Bedroom 🚿 2 Bathroom
📐 Type C — 920 sqft 🛏️ 3 Bedroom + Dual Key 🚿 2 Bathroom
我发现很多客户最后都是比较关注这几种 👇
🔘 2房自住 🔘 3房家庭用 🔘 Dual Key 投资出租
你比较想了解哪一种呢？ 😊

Here's the layout for your reference 👇
📐 Type A — 658 sqft 🛏️ 2 Bedroom 🚿 2 Bathroom
📐 Type B — 716 sqft 🛏️ 3 Bedroom 🚿 2 Bathroom
📐 Type C — 920 sqft 🛏️ 3 Bedroom + Dual Key 🚿 2 Bathroom
Most people usually end up looking at one of these 👇
🔘 2BR own stay 🔘 3BR for family 🔘 Dual Key for rental/investment
Which one you more keen to know? 😊
